title: AWIA Backup and Recovery — evidence SCADA configurations, PLC programs, historian data, water-quality data, and business systems are backed up to offline / immutable storage and restoration is tested
exclusions: Excludes ephemeral monitoring caches that do not constitute system-of-record. Excludes test / lab environments not part of production AWIA scope.
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.53.23` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `awia_clause="AWIA-EPA-backup-recovery"`. Every row pins (pwsid, system_id, system_class, backup_schedule, last_successful_backup_at, last_failed_backup_at, offline_immutable_copy, last_restore_test_at, restore_test_status, rto_target, rpo_target, backup_status).

compliance.assurance_rationale: Continuously evidences SCADA / PLC / historian / WQ / business systems are backed up on schedule, copied offline / immutable, and restore-tested at least annually.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search `UC-22.53.23` archived; restore-test reports retained.

controlTest.positiveScenario: PLC program backup `last_successful_backup_at` 30 days ago, no offline copy. UC-22.53.23 MUST surface with `backup_status="no_offline_immutable"`.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Same PLC with offline copy current, restore-test pass within 12 months. UC-22.53.23 MUST record `backup_status="current"`.

dataSources: Backup platform (Veeam / Commvault / Rubrik / Cohesity / Veritas / Catalogic), SCADA-config-archive (Rockwell FactoryTalk AssetCentre / Siemens Asset Manager), PLC-program-archive, restore-test log.
app: Splunk Add-on for Veeam Backup & Replication (Splunkbase 5072), Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263).
spl:
| inputlookup awia_backup_inventory_lookup
| eval days_since_backup = if(isnotnull(last_successful_backup_at), round((now() - last_successful_backup_at) / 86400, 0), null())
| eval days_since_restore_test = if(isnotnull(last_restore_test_at), round((now() - last_restore_test_at) / 86400, 0), null())
| eval backup_status = case(
    isnull(last_successful_backup_at), "never_backed_up",
    days_since_backup > 7, "backup_overdue",
    isnull(offline_immutable_copy) OR offline_immutable_copy="false", "no_offline_immutable",
    isnull(last_restore_test_at), "never_restore_tested",
    days_since_restore_test > 365, "restore_test_overdue",
    restore_test_status="failed", "restore_test_failed",
    isnull(rto_target) OR isnull(rpo_target), "no_rto_rpo",
    1=1, "current")
| table pwsid system_id system_class backup_schedule last_successful_backup_at days_since_backup offline_immutable_copy last_restore_test_at days_since_restore_test restore_test_status rto_target rpo_target backup_status
description: Audits backup completion, offline / immutable copy presence, and restore-test recency.
value: Ransomware against SCADA is the AWIA Baseline cyber threat. Backups that are not offline / immutable are deletable by ransomware. Backups that are never restore-tested may not work when needed. This UC keeps the backup posture audit-defensible and operationally real.
implementation: (1) Onboard backup-platform logs. (2) Maintain `awia_backup_inventory_lookup`. (3) Daily UC-22.53.23. (4) Archive.
visualization: (Panel 1) Backup-status RAG. (Panel 2) Restore-test aging. (Panel 3) RTO / RPO distribution.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-22.53.8 deployed.
- Splunk ES.
- Indexes `index=backup`, `index=audit_evidence`.
- Lookup `awia_backup_inventory_lookup`.

## Step 1 — Configure data collection

Backup platform writes a job-status row per backup target; the backup-inventory lookup records each in-scope system with `system_class` in {scada_config, plc_program, historian_db, wq_db, business_finance, business_billing, business_files}.

## Step 2 — Create the search and alert

Daily 11:00.

```ini
[UC-22.53.23: AWIA Backup Recovery]
cron_schedule = 0 11 * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -1d@d
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.53.23,reg=AWIA,clause=AWIA-EPA-backup-recovery
action.notable.param.severity = high
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 3 — Validate deployment

Positive: no offline copy; UC fires.  Negative: full; UC clears.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

Dashboard `AWIA — Backup Recovery`. Runbook: configure immutable / offline target; schedule annual restore test.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**AWIA-specific failure modes**:

- **PLC program backup**: typically less frequent than data backup; ensure schedule includes every program change.
- **Historian retention**: AWIA does not specify historian retention but EPA inspectors expect 5 years; align with retention storage decisions.
- **Immutable target**: object-locked S3 / Azure Blob immutability / tape / Linux ZFS snapshot with admin lockout are acceptable; cloud-only backup that lacks legal-hold immutability is not.
grandmaExplanation: If ransomware wipes the water plant's computers, we need clean backups to rebuild. The backups must be offline (so ransomware can't reach them) and someone must have actually practised restoring them within the last year. We watch all three things and ring the bell if any is missing.
